Meta.title: Adel Labdelli Merioua — Full-Stack Developer
Meta.description: Full-stack developer specializing in Flutter mobile apps, modern web development, and cloud-deployed backend services.

Hero.name: Adel Labdelli Merioua
Hero.title: Full-Stack Developer & Mobile Application Specialist
Hero.subtitle: Flutter · Web Development · UI Design
Hero.tagline: I build scalable, high-performance mobile and web applications with modern architecture — from idea to App Store.

About.title: About me
About.heading: Mobile-first engineer, full-stack by trade
About.bio: I'm a mobile application developer with 5+ years of experience specializing in Flutter and cross-platform development. I build production-grade apps that ship to the App Store and Play Store, backed by clean backend services and thoughtful UI design.
About.extended: Beyond mobile, I work across the full stack — Node.js APIs, React frontends, and cloud deployments on GCP and AWS. I care about clean architecture, fast iteration, and code that's easy for the next person to read.
About.yearsExperience: {count, plural, =0 {Just starting out} =1 {# year of experience} other {# years of experience}}

Projects.title: Selected projects
Projects.subtitle: Production apps I've shipped, deployed, and maintained.

awashz.title: AwashZ — On-Demand Car Wash
awashz.subtitle: Location-based mobile service platform
awashz.shortDescription: A production-ready Flutter app that lets users book professional car wash and auto services delivered to their location.
awashz.fullDescription: AwashZ is a comprehensive on-demand service platform with real-time location tracking, secure payments, and a service-provider dashboard. Push notifications via FCM keep customers informed throughout each appointment.
awashz.highlights: Real-time bookings · GPS tracking · Payments · Push notifications

glamix.title: Glamix — Salon Booking
glamix.subtitle: Salon and grooming services marketplace
glamix.shortDescription: A salon discovery and appointment app with real-time availability, integrated payments, and intelligent reminders.
glamix.fullDescription: Glamix lets users discover nearby salons, browse services, and book appointments seamlessly. Includes ratings & reviews, push reminders, and a dedicated dashboard for service providers to manage availability.
glamix.highlights: Real-time availability · Reviews · Payment gateway · Provider dashboard

discountPlus.title: Discount Plus — Loyalty & Coupons
discountPlus.subtitle: Digital loyalty and coupon platform
discountPlus.shortDescription: A loyalty-and-coupons mobile app that connects local merchants with shoppers through location-aware deals and a points wallet.
discountPlus.fullDescription: Discount Plus is a cross-platform Flutter app delivering location-based deals, a digital points wallet, and a merchant-facing portal for issuing and redeeming coupons. Built on Firebase with secure auth and real-time deal updates.
discountPlus.highlights: Geo-aware deals · Points wallet · Merchant portal · Firebase backend

Skills.title: Skills & expertise
Skills.subtitle: The tools and patterns I reach for to ship reliable software.

mobile.title: Mobile development
mobile.description: Responsive, performant cross-platform apps with Flutter, following Material Design and Cupertino guidelines.

backend.title: Backend development
backend.description: Scalable REST and GraphQL APIs with Node.js, Express, and NestJS, backed by real-time and relational databases.

frontend.title: Frontend web development
frontend.description: Modern, accessible web UIs with TypeScript and React — focused on performance and clean component design.

Experience.title: Experience
Experience.subtitle: Five-plus years building production software across mobile, web, and backend.

lead.description: Leading mobile app delivery for on-demand service platforms (AwashZ, Glamix). End-to-end ownership of Flutter apps, Firebase backends, and Play Store / App Store releases.

fullStack.description: Built cross-platform Flutter apps and Node.js APIs for clients across the GCC. Focus on clean architecture, payment integrations, and real-time features.

mobile.description: Shipped multiple Flutter apps to production, gaining deep experience with state management (BLoC, Provider), Firebase, and REST integration.

Contact.title: Let's work together
Contact.subtitle: Got a project in mind or just want to say hi? I'd love to hear about it.
